title: 의외로 남자들한테 인기 많은 여자 유형ㅋㅋㅋ
text: Girls find that annoying, too. Even though I'm a guy, I don't understand why they act like that while hanging out. I'm more comfortable with men than women. Oh, look at those girls acting like that, telling their kids to have a power struggle. You were a mastermind too. I don't understand why they only get close with the male seniors. I want to get close with the female seniors too. Oh, I can't even make female friends. Ugh, women are so exhausting. I don't know why I live. Isn't that the kind of personality you have? You know what I mean. Oh, I'm more comfortable with women and men. Women have to do things like that for each other. I know it's just empty words anyway. "You're so pretty, unnie." "Oh my, unnie. Where do you live?" "Unnie, do you live in Suwon?" "I know a famous restaurant in Suwon, let's all go eat there." You have to do things like that. Of course, I have no intention of actually going. If you say that about 10 times, they'll go eat once or twice, and then you become close. Men don't do that, do they? They hate it when you do that to women. I have the opposite; I have more female friends, but you just have to accept it. Maybe it's just because it's more comfortable. I've been close with men until now, so the behaviors I show them are just ingrained in me. You ca n't help it. It's really just that. That's definitely true. On average, female friends like it when you're good at empathizing. Guys, on the other hand, will just

title: 의외로 남자들한테 인기 많은 여자 유형ㅋㅋㅋ
text: men until now, so the behaviors I show them are just ingrained in me. You ca n't help it. It's really just that. That's definitely true. On average, female friends like it when you're good at empathizing. Guys, on the other hand, will just say things like, "You idiot, why are you so funny?" even if you make them laugh. They compete with each other. They really want to hear, "I acknowledge you." Why are they so desperate for recognition? The problem is, they'll say, " I'll do something even crazier," and open a hard-boiled egg. The friend women want to be is someone who is good at empathizing, my soulmate, someone who listens well to my stories, someone I feel comfortable being with, someone I want to watch movies with, go shopping with, and eat spicy tteokbokki with. The friend men want to be is someone I feel I should n't introduce to my mom. A guy who is funny just to watch. " What kind of conversation is this at Daewang High School?" I was eating spicy pork stir-fry and did n't say a word, but even then, there were more girls than men. And it might be because you're a bit pretty. If you're pretty, naturally, older guys will flock to you. From what I've seen, it's probably one of two things: first, you're so pretty that you're popular with guys, so you naturally drift away from women; or second, you text

title: 의외로 남자들한테 인기 많은 여자 유형ㅋㅋㅋ
text: bit pretty. If you're pretty, naturally, older guys will flock to you. From what I've seen, it's probably one of two things: first, you're so pretty that you're popular with guys, so you naturally drift away from women; or second, you text a girl or something. Guys actually like that more. Taking a shower or being really laid-back is the best. I'm telling you, that's what happens. If you're not careful, you might get a confession from a friend later saying, "You're different from the others." Friend, the biggest victims of confession attacks are the ones with that kind of personality. It's so fun and comfortable being with you. Everyone, running a niche market isn't bad. However, even though you're a guy, if you open it up, you won't get anything. Do it well, daughters. Girls find that annoying too. Even though I'm a guy, I don't know why they act like that while hanging out. I'm more comfortable with men than women. Oh, and girls act like that telling their kids to fight over height. You need to know how to play in moderation. They say it's good that you're nice to the seniors, but I have n't been able to talk to any female seniors. Of course, male seniors talk to female seniors first, but female seniors wait. It's kind of like, from a senior's perspective, they don't just blurt things out first, so it's like that. Since there are many of them, you need to take the initiative and do that first. [Music]
